---
title: "Linear Algebra & Matrices"
description: "Eigenvalues, SVD, positive definite matrices, Perron-Frobenius, graph Laplacians."
listing:
  contents: "*/index.qmd"
  type: default
  sort: "date desc"
  categories: true
  fields: [title, description, date, categories]
---

```{=html}
<div class="hero">
  <div class="kicker"><span data-topic-count="linear-algebra-matrix"></span> TUTORIALS</div>
  <h1>Linear Algebra & Matrices</h1>
  <p class="lead">Eigenvalues, SVD, positive definite matrices, Perron-Frobenius, graph Laplacians.</p>
</div>
```
